case_title: ROGER JIN VS. BWA LAW GROUP

docket_entries.description: PLAINTIFF ROGER JIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JEREMY ALBERTS FOR BWA LAW GROUP IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE DISPUTE WAS MEANT TO BE ARBITRATED PER SIGNED AGREEMENT. ANY CIVIL ACTION MUST OCCUR IN ORANGE COUNTY, CALIFORNIA.
